name: ArchiveSlideShellNav
observations: 2026-04-13: Archived slide-shell-nav change to openspec/changes/archive/2026-04-13-slide-shell-nav
2026-04-13: Synced 4 delta specs to main openspec/specs/ with post-implementation fixes incorporated
2026-04-13: Updated slide-routing spec with transitionDirection, dipToActive, useRef blocking
2026-04-13: Created new slide-nav spec with proximity scaling (cosine falloff), no translateY, mobile back/next arrows, lg-* assets, role=toolbar
2026-04-13: Created new slide-shell spec with double-rAF dipFrom, explicit dipToActive prop, flex-1/flex-shrink-0 layout, picture zoom values (1.8x/0.6x)
2026-04-13: Created new slide-pages spec with full props list (including transitionDirection, dipToActive)

name: Bankas2026
observations: 2026-04-13: Implemented forest-welcome-slide change - full ForestWelcome slide with logo, markdown content (react-markdown v10 with custom Components), 3 content images with rotation, 3 flying creatures (drift/drift-reverse), background with 3 cycling overlays (setTimeout chain, 2s visible, 4s gap, 500ms ease), dipFrom gold dipTo text color
2026-04-13: react-markdown v10 exports Markdown as default export, not named - import Markdown from 'react-markdown' (not { Markdown })
2026-04-13: Added px-4 md:px-8 padding to Slide.tsx picture slot for breathing room from page edges
2026-04-25: Rope refactor complete - ropes moved from separate arrays to PlatformPlacement.rope? optional field. rope.y and rope.length are screen-pixel values (not scaled by SPRITE_SCALE)
2026-04-25: Fixed rope climbing - x-snap now centers player feet on rope center, platform collision skipped while on rope, justLeftRope flag prevents re-grab until keys released
2026-04-25: Fixed rope grab reach - 50px ROPE_GRAB_REACH below rope bottom (shoulder height), player snapped to rope.bottomY when grabbing from below

2026-04-25: Fixed walk-off-platform - platform collision uses feetCenter instead of full hitbox for horizontal overlap, landing check requires vy>30 to prevent re-catch, jumpDir reset to 0 on all landings
2026-04-25: Mobile touch controls - 15% bigger (CONTROL_SCALE=1.15), repositioned inward/up (bottom-12 left-10, jump bottom-16 right-10), text selection disabled site-wide via body user-select:none

2026-04-25: Fixed modal scrollbar overflow - ClimbingGame wrapper needed min-h-0 to constrain within flex parent. Canvas no longer sets explicit style.width/height (uses Tailwind h-full w-full instead). ResizeObserver replaces window resize listener.
2026-04-25: Added virtual game scaling - REF_WIDTH=675, gameScale=cssWidth/REF_WIDTH applied to canvas context. Game logic runs at virtual 675px width, taller screens see more vertically.
2026-04-25: Added terminal velocity (800px/s), velocity-scaled landing window, base platform as absolute floor in clampToScreen
2026-04-25: Underground gradient below base platform (brown #5c3a1e to black #0a0604), renders behind platform sprite, starts at groundLineY
2026-04-25: Clouds render in front of player/platforms (after renderPlayer), standing character faces last movement direction (standingLeft state added)
2026-04-25: UI fixes - text-base replaced with text-[length:1rem] (Tailwind v4 color collision), BlueButton component for game buttons, bold control instructions, user-select:none on body
